hero.title: Billing and quota controls
hero.body: Manage the recurring workspace subscription and per-agent payment controls for exchange overages.

subscription.title: Workspace plan
subscription.body: Recurring subscription details and billing provider status.
subscription.infoBody: Stripe manages recurring subscriptions. Per-agent overages settle separately via x402 payments.

quota.title: Current hosted limits
quota.body: Usage across daily limits and seat allowances. Exhausting the free tier triggers upgrade prompts.
quota.activeAgentsHelper: Active enrolled agents for this workspace.
quota.infoBody: x402 overages settle before release and use a separate USDC ledger from the recurring billing record.

x402.title: Per-agent monthly budgets
x402.body: Free-tier workspaces get 10 monthly exchange requests. After that, enrolled agents need an explicit x402 budget.
x402.budgetHint: Stored in USD cents per UTC calendar month.
x402.budgetHintAgent: Only active enrolled agents can receive an x402 allowance.
x402.emptyBody: Set a monthly budget for an enrolled agent to enable paid overages.
x402.errorBudgetInput: Select an agent and enter a non-negative budget in cents.

ledger.title: Recent autonomous payments
ledger.body: Per-agent payment ledger: quoted spend, settlement status, and chain transaction reference.
ledger.emptyBody: Paid exchange overages will appear here after the free monthly cap is exhausted.

loading.title: Loading billing overview
loading.body: Reading workspace plan, customer reference, and daily usage.
